conviction_board.narrative: The move higher is happening on thin volume. Low-conviction rallies have a habit of fading just when you commit. Trend-following signals are turning positive. Not enough for an aggressive bet, but enough to stay constructive. Momentum is picking up nicely — RSI at 62 has room to run before hitting overbought territory. Volume is thin (0.3x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Newsflow is mildly positive — 2 items in the last 48 hours — 'JSW Steel shares gain as Q1 earnings boost investor sentiment' (Hindu BusinessLine) is the headline to watch. The tape is chopping sideways with 50% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Metals is lagging the broader tape (score 30) — an extra headwind. Bull case: momentum carries to ₹1,341 if volume confirms. Bear case: fades below ₹1,217 — failed rally territory. Above ₹1,265, the setup stays alive. ₹1,295 is the next hurdle. Verdict: BUY. Entry zone near ₹1,269 — speed matters. Outlook: Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish.
